body:
Regulation: B.C. Reg. 52/2026
Made under: Health Authorities Act
Published in: No. 6 – B.C. Regs. 43 to 56, April 7, 2026
Deposit date: April 7, 2026

B.C. Reg. 52/2026, deposited April 7, 2026, under theHEALTH AUTHORITIES ACT[section 21]. Order in Council 129/2026, approved and ordered April 7, 2026. On the recommendation of the undersigned, the Administrator, by and with the advice and consent of the Executive Council, orders that (a)	the Amalgamation of Regional Health Boards and Community Health Councils Regulation, B.C. Reg. 338/96, is amended as set out in the attached Schedule 1, (b)	the Board and Council Purposes Regulation, B.C. Reg. 376/98, is amended as set out in the attached Schedule 2, and (c)	the Hospital Transfer Regulation, B.C. Reg. 359/94, is amended as set out in the attached Schedule 3. — J. OSBORNE,Minister of Health; R. PARMAR,Presiding Member of the Executive Council. 1	The title of the Amalgamation of Regional Health Boards and Community Health Councils Regulation, B.C. Reg. 338/96, is repealed and the following substituted: AMALGAMATION OF REGIONAL HEALTH BOARDS REGULATION. 2	Section 1 is amended by repealing the definitions of"new council"and"old council". 3	Sections 3 and 4 are repealed. 4	Section 5 (1) is amended by striking out "section 2, 3 or 4" and substituting "section 2", by striking out ", new council or board, as the case may be," and by striking out ", new council or board acquired by the amalgamation" and substituting "acquired by the amalgamation". 5	Section 6 is amended by striking out "or community health council" wherever it appears. 1	The title of the Board and Council Purposes Regulation, B.C. Reg. 376/98, is repealed and the following substituted: REGIONAL HEALTH BOARD PURPOSES  REGULATION. (a)	by striking out "and under section 7 of the Act for councils", and (b)	in paragraph (b) by striking out "or council". 1	Section 1 of the Hospital Transfer Regulation, B.C. Reg. 359/94, is amended by striking out "or council" wherever it appears. Index Page|Previous Regulation|Next Regulation|Cumulative Index Page Copyright © 2026: King's Printer, Victoria, British Columbia, Canada

minutes_briefs.title: BC removes community health councils from health authority regulations
minutes_briefs.summary: British Columbia has amended three regulations under the Health Authorities Act to remove all references to community health councils. The changes update the Amalgamation of Regional Health Boards and Community Health Councils Regulation, the Board and Council Purposes Regulation, and the Hospital Transfer Regulation. This means community health councils are no longer part of these rules, and only regional health boards are covered going forward.
